summary: Oil is around $70 a barrel, well off the $112.95 it was back in April. With the Strait of Hormuz reopening, oil stocks have slumped, but in the long run, countries will be looking to build up their reserves.

headline: Qualcomm Wants to Bring AI Data Center Power to Your Smartphone
summary: Artificial intelligence is rapidly shifting from the cloud to the devices we use every day. The first wave of generative AI relied on massive data centers packed with expensive graphics processors. The next phase is about making AI faster, cheaper, and more private by moving more of that computing directly onto smartphones, laptops, and vehicles. ... Qualcomm Wants to Bring AI Data Center Power to Your Smartphone
